content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "哪個比較便宜？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，請問這個便當和那個飯糰，哪個比較便宜？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn zhège biàndāng hé nàge fàntuán, nǎge bǐjiào piányí?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 zhe4 ge4 bian4 dang1 he2 na4 ge4 fan4 tuan2, na3 ge4 bi3 jiao4 pian2 yi2?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, may I ask, between this bento and that rice ball, which one is cheaper?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 이 도시락과 저 주먹밥 중에 어느 것이 더 싼가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "飯糰比較便宜，一個只要三十塊。便當比較貴，要八十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Fàntuán bǐjiào piányí, yīge zhǐ yào sānshí kuài. Biàndāng bǐjiào guì, yào bāshí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Fan4 tuan2 bi3 jiao4 pian2 yi2, yi1 ge4 zhi3 yao4 san1 shi2 kuai4. Bian4 dang1 bi3 jiao4 gui4, yao4 ba1 shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "The rice ball is cheaper, only 30 dollars. The bento is more expensive, 80 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "주먹밥이 더 싸요, 하나에 30원이에요. 도시락은 더 비싸서 80원이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "可是便當的份量比較多，我覺得比較划算。",
          "pinyin": "Kěshì biàndāng de fènliàng bǐjiào duō, wǒ juéde bǐjiào huásuàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3 shi4 bian4 dang1 de fen4 liang4 bi3 jiao4 duo1, wo3 jue2 de5 bi3 jiao4 hua2 suan4.",
          "translation_en": "But the bento has a larger portion, I think it's more cost-effective.",
          "translation_ko": "그런데 도시락 양이 더 많아서 더划算한 것 같아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，便當的份量差不多是飯糰的兩倍，所以價格也差很多。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, biàndāng de fènliàng chàbùduō shì fàntuán de liǎng bèi, suǒyǐ jiàgé yě chà hěnduō.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, bian4 dang1 de fen4 liang4 cha4 bu4 duo1 shi4 fan4 tuan2 de liang3 bei4, suo3 yi3 jia4 ge2 ye3 cha4 hen3 duo1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, the bento's portion is about twice that of the rice ball, so the price is also very different.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 도시락 양이 주먹밥의 약 두 배라서 가격도 많이 차이 나요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那我決定買便當，因為比較值得。",
          "pinyin": "Nà wǒ juédìng mǎi biàndāng, yīnwèi bǐjiào zhídé.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 wo3 jue2 ding4 mai3 bian4 dang1, yin1 wei4 bi3 jiao4 zhi2 de2.",
          "translation_en": "Then I decide to buy the bento, because it's more worth it.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 도시락을 사기로 결정할게요, 더 가치 있으니까요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer decide to buy?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 사기로 결정했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Rice ball", "Bento", "Both"],
          "options_ko": ["주먹밥", "도시락", "둘 다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of comparison words like 比較 and 差不多.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Compare two items in a convenience store and explain which one you think is more cost-effective and why."
    },
    {
      "title": "哪個比較好？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這兩家餐廳，你覺得哪一家比較好？",
          "pinyin": "Zhè liǎng jiā cāntīng, nǐ juéde nǎ yī jiā bǐjiào hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 liang3 jia1 can1 ting1, ni3 jue2 de5 na3 yi1 jia1 bi3 jiao4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Between these two restaurants, which one do you think is better?",
          "translation_ko": "이 두 식당 중에 어느 쪽이 더 좋다고 생각하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "第一家環境比較好，氣氛很舒服。第二家價格比較便宜，服務也不錯。",
          "pinyin": "Dì yī jiā huánjìng bǐjiào hǎo, qìfēn hěn shūfú. Dì èr jiā jiàgé bǐjiào piányí, fúwù yě bùcuò.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Di4 yi1 jia1 huan2 jing4 bi3 jiao4 hao3, qi4 fen1 hen3 shu1 fu2. Di4 er4 jia1 jia4 ge2 bi3 jiao4 pian2 yi2, fu2 wu4 ye3 bu4 cuo4.",
          "translation_en": "The first one has a better environment, the atmosphere is very comfortable. The second one has cheaper prices, and the service is not bad.",
          "translation_ko": "첫 번째 식당은 환경이 더 좋고 분위기가 아주 편안해요. 두 번째 식당은 가격이 더 싸고 서비스도 괜찮아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那味道呢？哪一家的菜比較好吃？",
          "pinyin": "Nà wèidào ne? Nǎ yī jiā de cài bǐjiào hǎochī?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 wei4 dao4 ne5? Na3 yi1 jia1 de cai4 bi3 jiao4 hao3 chi1?",
          "translation_en": "What about the taste? Which restaurant's food is more delicious?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 맛은요? 어느 식당 음식이 더 맛있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我覺得味道差不多，都很新鮮。不過第一家的份量比較少，第二家比較多。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ juéde wèidào chàbùduō, dōu hěn xīnxiān. Búguò dì yī jiā de fènliàng bǐjiào shǎo, dì èr jiā bǐjiào duō.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 jue2 de5 wei4 dao4 cha4 bu4 duo1, dou1 hen3 xin1 xian1. Bu2 guo4 di4 yi1 jia1 de fen4 liang4 bi3 jiao4 shao3, di4 er4 jia1 bi3 jiao4 duo1.",
          "translation_en": "I think the taste is similar, both are very fresh. But the first one has smaller portions, the second one has larger portions.",
          "translation_ko": "맛은 비슷해요, 둘 다 아주 신선해요. 그런데 첫 번째는 양이 적고 두 번째는 양이 많아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這樣的話，我寧願去第二家，因為比較划算。",
          "pinyin": "Zhèyàng dehuà, wǒ nìngyuàn qù dì èr jiā, yīnwèi bǐjiào huásuàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 yang4 de5 hua4, wo3 ning4 yuan4 qu4 di4 er4 jia1, yin1 wei4 bi3 jiao4 hua2 suan4.",
          "translation_en": "In that case, I'd rather go to the second one, because it's more cost-effective.",
          "translation_ko": "그렇다면 저는 두 번째 식당에 갈래요, 더划算하니까요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Which restaurant does the customer prefer?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어느 식당을 더 선호합니까?",
          "options_en": ["First restaurant", "Second restaurant", "Neither"],
          "options_ko": ["첫 번째 식당", "두 번째 식당", "둘 다 아님"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the comparison structure 比較 and the contrast word 不過.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Compare two restaurants you know and explain which one you prefer and why."
    },
    {
      "title": "台北和高雄的比較",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你覺得台北和高雄有什麼不同？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ juéde Táiběi hé Gāoxióng yǒu shénme bùtóng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 jue2 de5 Tai2 bei3 he2 Gao1 xiong2 you3 shen2 me5 bu4 tong2?",
          "translation_en": "What differences do you think there are between Taipei and Kaohsiung?",
          "translation_ko": "타이베이와 가오슝은 어떤 차이가 있다고 생각하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "台北比較熱鬧，交通很方便，捷運路線很多。高雄比較安靜，環境很舒服。",
          "pinyin": "Táiběi bǐjiào rènào, jiāotōng hěn fāngbiàn, jiéyùn lùxiàn hěnduō. Gāoxióng bǐjiào ānjìng, huánjìng hěn shūfú.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai2 bei3 bi3 jiao4 re4 nao4, jiao1 tong1 hen3 fang1 bian4, jie2 yun4 lu4 xian4 hen3 duo1. Gao1 xiong2 bi3 jiao4 an1 jing4, huan2 jing4 hen3 shu1 fu2.",
          "translation_en": "Taipei is more lively, transportation is very convenient, and there are many MRT lines. Kaohsiung is quieter, and the environment is very comfortable.",
          "translation_ko": "타이베이는 더 번화하고 교통이 편리하며 지하철 노선이 많아요. 가오슝은 더 조용하고 환경이 편안해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那價格呢？台北的物價是不是比較貴？",
          "pinyin": "Nà jiàgé ne? Táiběi de wùjià shì bùshì bǐjiào guì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 jia4 ge2 ne5? Tai2 bei3 de wu4 jia4 shi4 bu5 shi4 bi3 jiao4 gui4?",
          "translation_en": "What about prices? Is the cost of living in Taipei more expensive?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 가격은요? 타이베이 물가가 더 비싸지 않나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，台北的價格比較高，尤其是餐廳和房子。高雄比較平價，同樣的東西便宜很多。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, Táiběi de jiàgé bǐjiào gāo, yóuqí shì cāntīng hé fángzi. Gāoxióng bǐjiào píngjià, tóngyàng de dōngxi piányí hěnduō.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, Tai2 bei3 de jia4 ge2 bi3 jiao4 gao1, you2 qi2 shi4 can1 ting1 he2 fang2 zi5. Gao1 xiong2 bi3 jiao4 ping2 jia4, tong2 yang4 de dong1 xi5 pian2 yi2 hen3 duo1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, prices in Taipei are higher, especially for restaurants and housing. Kaohsiung is more affordable, the same things are much cheaper.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 타이베이는 가격이 더 높아요, 특히 식당과 집값이요. 가오슝은 더 저렴해서 같은 물건이 훨씬 싸요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你比較喜歡哪一個城市？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ bǐjiào xǐhuān nǎ yīge chéngshì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 bi3 jiao4 xi3 huan1 na3 yi1 ge4 cheng2 shi4?",
          "translation_en": "Then which city do you prefer?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 당신은 어느 도시를 더 좋아하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我比較喜歡高雄，因為生活步調比較慢，壓力也比較小。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān Gāoxióng, yīnwèi shēnghuó bùdiào bǐjiào màn, yālì yě bǐjiào xiǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bi3 jiao4 xi3 huan1 Gao1 xiong2, yin1 wei4 sheng1 huo2 bu4 diao4 bi3 jiao4 man4, ya1 li4 ye3 bi3 jiao4 xiao3.",
          "translation_en": "I prefer Kaohsiung, because the pace of life is slower and the stress is less.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 가오슝이 더 좋아요, 생활 속도가 더 느리고 스트레스도 덜하거든요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Which city does the speaker prefer?",
          "question_ko": "화자는 어느 도시를 더 선호합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Taipei", "Kaohsiung", "Both"],
          "options_ko": ["타이베이", "가오슝", "둘 다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the comparison words 比較 and the contrast between the two cities.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Compare two cities you know and explain which one you prefer and why."
    }
  ]
}
